text: We walk away from our dreams afraid we may fail—or worse, afraid we may succeed.
author: William Forrester, *Finding Forrester*

text: You know how everyone's always saying, 'Seize the moment'? I don't know—I’m kinda thinkin' it's the other way. Like the moment seizes us.
author: Unknown, *Anonymous Movie/Article*

text: Fear is the mind-killer. I must not fear.
author: Paul Atreides, *Dune*

text: You never really understand a person until you consider things from his point of view… Until you climb inside his skin and walk around in it.
author: Atticus Finch, *To Kill a Mockingbird*

text: The world ain't all sunshine and rainbows. It is a very mean and nasty place—and it will beat you to your knees and keep you there permanently if you let it.
author: Rocky Balboa, *Rocky Balboa*

text: The very things that hold you down are going to lift you up.
author: Dumbo, *Dumbo*

text: To see the world… to see behind walls, to draw closer, to find each other and to feel. That is the purpose of life.
author: Narrator, *The Secret Life of Walter Mitty*

text: You got a dream. You gotta protect it. People can't do something themselves, they wanna tell you you can’t do it.
author: Christopher Gardner, *The Pursuit of Happyness*
Sherlock Holmes, *The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes*

text: May the odds be ever in your favor.
author: Effie Trinket, *The Hunger Games*
